I successfully called the manySchemasTool with valid sample data that satisfies all the schema requirements. The tool accepted all the parameters and returned the data, confirming that:

- All string constraints were met (minimum/maximum lengths, email format, URL format, UUID format, CUID format, regex pattern)
- All number constraints were satisfied (greater than, less than, multiples, integers)
- Array constraints were respected (minimum and maximum lengths)
- Date constraints were followed (valid date-time formats, before/after constraints)
- Object structures matched the required schemas
- Nullable field was set to null as requested
- Enum values were from the allowed sets
- Union types were properly handled
- Default value was used correctly

The function executed successfully and returned all the provided sample data.

- **String fields**: Various text samples with appropriate constraints (min/max length, regex patterns, formats)
- **Number fields**: Different numeric values meeting the specified constraints (greater than, less than, multiples, integers)
